summary: Keep workspace terminals visually stable when resizing from one pane to many panes.

review_items.summary: WorkspaceTerminal defaults to xterm's stable canvas renderer instead of attaching the WebGL addon, preventing glyph atlas corruption when several terminal panes are created and resized at once.
Terminal process startup, resize commands, close commands, auth, billing, workspace API, and database contracts are unchanged.

rules: Workspace terminal rendering must remain readable when terminal count changes from one pane to multiple panes.
Adding terminal panes must not corrupt the existing pane's visible text.
Terminal renderer changes must not alter terminal process lifecycle, PTY sizing contracts, auth behavior, billing behavior, hosted API contracts, or database behavior.

patches.summary: Disable WebGL renderer attachment by default so multi-pane terminal grids use xterm's stable canvas renderer.

compatibility.notes: Local desktop renderer behavior only; no API or data contract changes.

tests.summary: Validate the React terminal renderer change.
